ja_html: <ruby><rb>会</rb><rt>あ</rt></ruby>いたくて <ruby><rb>会</rb><rt>あ</rt></ruby>いたくて <ruby><rb>震</rb><rt>ふる</rt></ruby>える
zh_text: 好想見你 好想見你 身體顫抖著
en_text: I want to see you, I want to see you, I shiver

zh_text: 越是思念你 越是感覺遙遠
en_text: The more I think of you, the further away you feel

ja_html: もう<ruby><rb>一度</rb><rt>いちど</rt></ruby><ruby><rb>聞</rb><rt>き</rt></ruby>かせて<ruby><rb>嘘</rb><rt>うそ</rt></ruby>でも
zh_text: 請再讓我聽一次 即使是謊言也好
en_text: Let me hear it once more, even if it's a lie

ja_html: あの<ruby><rb>日</rb><rt>ひ</rt></ruby>のように“<ruby><rb>好</rb><rt>す</rt></ruby>きだよ”って…
zh_text: 就像那天一樣 說聲“我喜歡你”…
en_text: Just like that day, say "I love you"...

ja_html: <ruby><rb>今日</rb><rt>きょう</rt></ruby>は<ruby><rb>記念日</rb><rt>きねんび</rt></ruby> <ruby><rb>本当</rb><rt>ほんとう</rt></ruby>だったら <ruby><rb>二人</rb><rt>ふたり</rt></ruby><ruby><rb>過</rb><rt>す</rt></ruby>ごしていたかな
zh_text: 今天是紀念日 如果是真的 我們兩人會一起度過嗎
en_text: Today is our anniversary, if things were different, would we have spent it together?

ja_html: きっと<ruby><rb>君</rb><rt>きみ</rt></ruby>は<ruby><rb>全部</rb><rt>ぜんぶ</rt></ruby><ruby><rb>忘</rb><rt>わす</rt></ruby>れて あの<ruby><rb>子</rb><rt>こ</rt></ruby>と<ruby><rb>笑</rb><rt>わら</rt></ruby>いあってるの?
zh_text: 你一定全都忘了 正和那女孩一起歡笑吧?
en_text: Surely you've forgotten everything and are laughing together with that girl?

ja_html: ずっと<ruby><rb>私</rb><rt>わたし</rt></ruby>だけにくれてた<ruby><rb>言葉</rb><rt>ことば</rt></ruby>も<ruby><rb>優</rb><rt>やさ</rt></ruby>しさも
zh_text: 一直以來只對我說的話語和溫柔
en_text: The words and the kindness you used to give only to me all this time

ja_html: <ruby><rb>大好</rb><rt>だいす</rt></ruby>きだった<ruby><rb>笑顔</rb><rt>えがお</rt></ruby>も<ruby><rb>全部</rb><rt>ぜんぶ</rt></ruby> あの<ruby><rb>子</rb><rt>こ</rt></ruby>にも<ruby><rb>見</rb><rt>み</rt></ruby>せてるの?
zh_text: 還有我最喜歡的笑容 現在也全都給那女孩看了嗎?
en_text: And the smile that I loved so much, are you showing them all to that girl too?

ja_html: Baby I know
zh_text: 寶貝 我知道
en_text: Baby I know

en_text: At least to the extent that you are no longer mine

en_text: But no matter what, it has to be you, nobody else will do
